title: humboltia univaginata
intro: Humboltia univaginata, also known as the single-petaled Humboldtia, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Humboltia univaginata are said to include reducing fever and pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant are often used to make infusions and decoctions, which can be taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
